case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. JANET LAWSON et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-02-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LAWSON, JANET DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-15-2009

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395 (B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-02-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
